en.title: Output
en.description: A compact view of research output, open-source work, talks, and project-facing deliverables. This page should gradually become the most evidence-dense layer of the site.
en.introNote: This page should gradually turn from placeholder entries into the most evidence-dense layer of the site.

sections.title: Publications / research drafts
sections.description: Placeholder entries for papers, preprints, workshop submissions, and long-form research documents.

items.title: Embodied Memory Bench Draft
items.description: An evolving benchmark concept for testing memory retrieval under long-horizon embodied tasks.

items.title: UAV VLN System Report
items.description: A placeholder technical report that documents system assumptions, environment choices, and initial evaluation protocol.

sections.title: Open source / engineering output
sections.description: Code assets, internal tooling, templates, and experiment systems that support research execution.

items.title: Paper Reproduction Starter Kit
items.description: A reusable structure for experiments, assumptions, implementation notes, and logging checkpoints.

items.title: Research Ops Dashboard
items.description: A dashboard concept for keeping notes, experiments, reading progress, and weekly summaries aligned.

sections.title: Talks / demos / presentations
sections.description: Places to surface demos, reading-group talks, internal reviews, or public-facing technical presentations.

items.title: Reading Group: Embodied Evaluation
items.description: A placeholder presentation on why embodied evaluation should capture reasoning quality, not only final success.

zh.title: 成果
zh.description: 把论文、草稿、开源、技术报告、演讲和 Demo 集中在一个地方。它应该逐渐成为这个站里证据密度最高的页面之一。
zh.introNote: 这个页面会逐渐从占位条目，演化成整站证据最密集的一层。

sections.title: 论文 / 研究草稿
sections.description: 放论文、预印本、Workshop 提交稿和较完整的研究文档。

items.title: 具身智能体记忆评测草案
items.description: 一个关于长时具身任务中记忆检索能力评测的 benchmark 草案。

items.title: 无人机视觉语言导航系统报告
items.description: 一份占位技术报告，用来梳理系统假设、环境选择与初步评测协议。

sections.title: 开源 / 工程输出
sections.description: 支持研究执行的代码资产、内部工具、模板和实验系统。

items.title: 论文复现起步模板
items.description: 统一管理假设、实现笔记和实验检查点的可复用结构。

items.title: Research Ops Dashboard
items.description: 用于统一管理笔记、实验、阅读进度和周总结的研究工作流面板。

sections.title: 演讲 / Demo / 汇报
sections.description: 适合放 Reading Group 分享、组会汇报、公开展示和技术演讲。

items.title: 具身智能评测分享
items.description: 一份占位演讲，讨论为什么具身智能评测不能只看最终成功率。
